name: shopee-official-excel-export-skill
description: Standalone Shopee official Excel export skill.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/shopee-export.mjs && node --check scripts/export-official-excel.mjs && node --check scripts/write-google-summary.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('config/default.config.json','utf8')); console.log('config ok')"
